DataCleaningParameters.description:
Parameters for data cleaning workflow.

Required parameters must be explicitly set per CR-4.14-G-1
(avoid application-specific defaults).

mode.description: advisory: report only, preparatory: modify dataset
mode.title: Mode

outlier_use_dimension.description: Use dimension statistics for outlier detection
outlier_use_dimension.title: Outlier Use Dimension

outlier_use_pixel.description: Use pixel statistics for outlier detection
outlier_use_pixel.title: Outlier Use Pixel

outlier_use_visual.description: Use visual statistics for outlier detection
outlier_use_visual.title: Outlier Use Visual

outlier_threshold.description: Custom threshold (None = use DataEval default for chosen method)
outlier_threshold.title: Outlier Threshold

DataCleaningParameters.title: DataCleaningParameters

Configuration for a single ONNX model.

Pass-through configuration for DataEval's OnnxEncoder.

path.description: Path to the ONNX model file
path.title: Path
